'''âf-m-ng''' ('''kafamang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tirade|tirade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tirade|tirade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafamang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamang|thifamang]] || [[word:jifamang|jifamang]] || [[word:shifamang|shifamang]] || [[word:kifamang|kifamang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamang|thuthufamang]] || [[word:jujufamang|jujufamang]] || [[word:shushufamang|shushufamang]] || [[word:kukufamang|kukufamang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamang|thufamang]] || [[word:jufamang|jufamang]] || [[word:shufamang|shufamang]] || [[word:kufamang|kufamang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamang|thufamang]] || [[word:jufamang|jufamang]] || [[word:shufamang|shufamang]] || [[word:kufamang|kufamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamang|thefamang]] || [[word:jefamang|jefamang]] || [[word:shefamang|shefamang]] || [[word:kefamang|kefamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamang|thothofamang]] || [[word:jojofamang|jojofamang]] || [[word:shoshofamang|shoshofamang]] || [[word:kokofamang|kokofamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamang|thofamang]] || [[word:jofamang|jofamang]] || [[word:shofamang|shofamang]] || [[word:kofamang|kofamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamang|thofamang]] || [[word:jofamang|jofamang]] || [[word:shofamang|shofamang]] || [[word:kofamang|kofamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfamang|thĂŠfamang]] || [[word:jĂŠfamang|jĂŠfamang]] || [[word:shĂŠfamang|shĂŠfamang]] || [[word:kĂŠfamang|kĂŠfamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamang|thathafamang]] || [[word:jajafamang|jajafamang]] || [[word:shashafamang|shashafamang]] || [[word:kakafamang|kakafamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamang|thafamang]] || [[word:jafamang|jafamang]] || [[word:shafamang|shafamang]] || [[word:kafamang|kafamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamang|thafamang]] || [[word:jafamang|jafamang]] || [[word:shafamang|shafamang]] || [[word:kafamang|kafamang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafamang|shafamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamang|goshafamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamang|gokishafamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamangnĂŒ|shafamangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamangnknĂŒ|goshafamangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamangnĂŒ|gokishafamangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamangshĂ«|shafamangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamangnkshĂ«|goshafamangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamangshĂ«|gokishafamangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamangro|shafamangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamangnkro|goshafamangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamangro|gokishafamangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamangmu|shafamangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamangnkmu|goshafamangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamangmu|gokishafamangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamangsher|shafamangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamangnksher|goshafamangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamangsher|gokishafamangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamang|shafamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamangnkng|goshafamangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamang|gokishafamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamangya|shafamangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamangnkya|goshafamangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamangya|gokishafamangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamangyam|shafamangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamangnkyam|goshafamangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamangyam|gokishafamangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamangnĂŒshĂ«|shafamangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafamangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafamangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamangnĂŒro|shafamangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamangnknĂŒro|goshafamangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamangnĂŒro|gokishafamangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamangnĂŒmu|shafamangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamangnknĂŒmu|goshafamangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamangnĂŒmu|gokishafamangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamangshĂ«nĂŒ|shafamangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafamangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafamangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamangshĂ«ro|shafamangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamangnkshĂ«ro|goshafamangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamangshĂ«ro|gokishafamangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamangshĂ«mu|shafamangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamangnkshĂ«mu|goshafamangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamangshĂ«mu|gokishafamangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamangronĂŒ|shafamangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamangnkronĂŒ|goshafamangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamangronĂŒ|gokishafamangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamangroshĂ«|shafamangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamangnkroshĂ«|goshafamangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamangroshĂ«|gokishafamangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamangromu|shafamangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamangnkromu|goshafamangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamangromu|gokishafamangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamangmunĂŒ|shafamangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamangnkmunĂŒ|goshafamangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamangmunĂŒ|gokishafamangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamangmushĂ«|shafamangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamangnkmushĂ«|goshafamangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamangmushĂ«|gokishafamangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamangmuro|shafamangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamangnkmuro|goshafamangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamangmuro|gokishafamangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
